description_long: This object is a compact, modular greenhouse planter system designed for urban environments. It features a central rectangular planter box with vertical side panels and a series of integrated planting trays on either side, each containing visible green plants. The main body appears to be constructed from metal or composite panels, with black trim and a sleek, modern aesthetic. The planting trays are tiered and angled, allowing for efficient use of space and optimal sunlight exposure for the plants. The top of the central unit is filled with taller plants, while the side trays contain smaller, leafy vegetation. The overall design is functional and space-saving, suitable for sidewalks, parks, or community gardens.
description: A modular, modern greenhouse planter with a central box and tiered side trays, filled with visible green plants. The structure is sleek, metallic, and designed for urban use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the depth of the central planter and the angled, tiered planting trays filled with leafy plants.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the main planter box with tall plants and the extended side trays, emphasizing the modular design.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, showing the depth and arrangement of the planting trays and central unit.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the back of the central planter and the open, accessible planting trays on both sides.
